query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=serviceAllowlist ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email", "operator.sourceIp", "loginAndApi", "shareDashboards" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminIp, LoginAndApiStatus, ShareDashBoardStatus nodrop
| where EventName="ServiceAllowlistPermissionsSet"
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by EventTime, Admin, AdminIp, LoginAndApiStatus, ShareDashBoardStatus
| sort by EventTime
| fields - _count

sources.dashboardName: Enterprise Audit - Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities
sources.dashboardDescription: Password Policy, MFA, Service AllowList Activities Dashboard provides detailed information about password policy creation, deletion, and updates. It also provides a high-level view of users that enable and disable multi factor authorization (MFA), service allowlist updates, as well as user and admin activities.
